title: Unauthorized error when stopping workflow via API
symptom: When attempting to stop a workflow using the n8n API, the response is 'unauthorized'. This occurs despite using Basic Auth credentials.
applies_when: Using n8n API to stop a workflow
Basic Auth is used for authentication
not_this_if: Using the correct API key in the header
root_cause: The n8n API requires authentication via an API key in the header, not Basic Auth. If Basic Auth is used, the request will be unauthorized, leading to the error.
fix_steps: Generate an API key in Settings > n8n API
Include the API key in the request header as 'X-N8N-API-KEY'
Retry the request to stop the workflow
agent_instruction: Use the API key in the request header to authenticate when stopping a workflow.
